playbook.intent: Move from generic 'full-stack dev' to a paid specialist position (e.
playbook.scope: Move from generic 'full-stack dev' to a paid specialist position (e.g. headless-commerce on Shopify Hydrogen, or AI integrations for SMB SaaS) with 2 case studies, a tightened portfolio, and a 30-50% higher day rate.

success-criteria.criterion: Final stage decision-gate is met and committed in writing
Every stage produces its named outputs
Cycle closes only when a written commitment exists for the next step

stage.name: Pick the niche
stage.intent: Use the niche scorecard, not a hunch.

tasks.task: List candidate niches (e.g. headless commerce, AI integrations)
Score each on demand + supply + your fit

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with one niche named and one scorecard filled.

stage.name: Buyer interviews
stage.intent: 10 calls with people who pay specialists.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when buying signal is concrete.

stage.name: Skill upgrade plan
stage.intent: Close the gap to a credible specialist.

tasks.task: Map required skills against current ones
Pick 2-3 gaps to close in 8 weeks

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when practice projects ship publicly.

stage.name: Case study harvest
stage.intent: Convert old work into niche-relevant case studies.

tasks.task: Pick 2 past projects relevant to the niche
Re-write them as buyer-focused case studies
Add case-study clause to future contracts

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when 2 case studies are publishable.

stage.name: Positioning overhaul
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when 3 outsiders can guess the niche from your profile.

stage.name: Content + topical authority

tasks.task: Publish weekly across X + LinkedIn + blog

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when weekly cadence runs 6+ weeks.

stage.name: Partnership + community
stage.intent: Get inside the niches gravity wells.

tasks.task: Pitch a podcast or guest post in the niche

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when at least one partner or podcast booking lands.

stage.name: Rate jump + first specialist clients
stage.intent: Land work at the new rate.

tasks.task: Quote new clients at the higher rate
Hold firm on price during negotiation

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when at least one client books at the new rate.

stage.name: Lock the pivot
stage.intent: Decline non-niche work and audit traction.

tasks.task: Define explicit decline criteria for non-niche work
Commit to year-2 plan in the niche

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes when pivot is committed and non-niche work is being declined.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content specialty-niche-pivot-8-12-weeks-generalist-to-specialist --format md, agent: faion get-content specialty-niche-pivot-8-12-weeks-generalist-to-specialist --format context, json: faion get-content specialty-niche-pivot-8-12-weeks-generalist-to-specialist --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial v2 draft generated from F-059..063 backlog}]
